note: Patient zero. Norris-Piastri swap controversy. Fanbase split begins.
Piastri lap-1 overtake on Norris. 'Papaya rules' enters public discourse.
Piastri asked to let Norris through. 'Not proud about it' quote.
Norris held behind Piastri in final stint.
Papaya rules applied race 1 of new season.
Major flashpoint. 'Slow pit stops are part of racing' quote.
Piastri radio disconnect. 'Oscar's villain arc' meme. 'Control the controllables'.
Norris-Piastri collision. 'Papaya rules are finally over' fan response.
McLaren strategy failure. Title fight goes to final race.
Brown openly endorses team orders. Norris wins title. Constructors back-to-back.
